metadata.title:
ROADS MUST
CONSENT TO


UNION DEPOT

pages.raw_text:
Councilman Shaefer says the Mil
waukee and the North Coast will
never receive a franchise in Spo-
kane with his vote If they recede
from the plan of building a union
depot and granting common-user
privileges to other lines.


Shaefer will submit amendments
requiring the building of union
depot to cost 100000, work on
which shall begin within six
months after the franchise Is
granted and to be completed with
in two years. The roads to give
the city good bond for 100000
that they shall build this station
as stipulated.


His common-user amendment
proposes to have the lines of the
two roads from the east to the
west city limits open to other lines
that may want to use them, on the
payment of just compensation
therefor.
